category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

target_market_label.zh: 丹麦（DS / 供应监管局 / 能源网）
target_market_label.zht: 丹麥（DS / 供應監管局 / 能源網）

title.en: China-to-Denmark EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入丹麦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入丹麥：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Denmark (DS / Forsyningstilsynet / Energinet / Sikkerhedsstyrelsen) and EU CE framework expectations, including IEC 61851, IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2 compatibility, electrical protection-device requirements, national installation rules, and Denmark's smart-charging and wind-integration context.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与丹麦（DS / 供应监管局 / 能源网 / 安全局）及欧盟CE框架要求对照，涵盖IEC 61851、IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2兼容性、保护装置要求、国家安装规则，以及丹麦智能充电和风电融合背景。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與丹麥（DS / 供應監管局 / 能源網 / 安全局）及歐盟CE框架要求對照，涵蓋IEC 61851、IEC 62196-2 Type 2/CCS2相容性、保護裝置要求、國家安裝規則，以及丹麥智能充電和風電融合背景。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, customs determination, electrical-installation design, grid-operator approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and installers should verify current Denmark (DS / Forsyningstilsynet / Energinet / Sikkerhedsstyrelsen) and EU-CE requirements before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、海关裁定、电气安装设计、并网或市场准入批准。出口商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行丹麦（DS / 供应监管局 / 能源网 / 安全局）及欧盟CE相关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、海關裁定、電氣安裝設計、併網或市場准入批准。出口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行丹麥（DS / 供應監管局 / 能源網 / 安全局）及歐盟CE相關要求。

answer_first.en: For Denmark-bound EV chargers, the most critical gaps are Type 2/CCS2 connector alignment under IEC 62196, compatibility with AFIR obligations as implemented through member-state practice, CE conformity evidence under LVD/EMC/RED where in scope, RCD/RDC protection, and Denmark/Energinet installation and grid-operator coordination. 230/400 V 50 Hz parameters are required for project readiness. Denmark's high penetration of wind power and advanced smart-charging ecosystem (including V2G pilots) means OCPP and smart-charging functionality are often expected even for commercial deployments. Port of Aarhus and Port of Copenhagen are the primary entry ports.
answer_first.zh: 对于丹麦，关键差距包括IEC 62196下Type 2与CCS2接口一致性、成员国实施下AFIR义务、适用范围内的LVD/EMC/RED合规证据、RCD/RDC保护，以及丹麦能源网并网/项目协调要求。须以230/400 V、50 Hz参数完成交付准备。丹麦风电渗透率高且已建立先进的智能充电生态（含V2G试点），意味着商业部署通常也需具备OCPP和智能充电功能。奥胡斯港和哥本哈根港为主要入境口岸。
answer_first.zht: 對於丹麥，關鍵差距包括IEC 62196下Type 2與CCS2介面一致性、會員國實施下AFIR義務、適用範圍內的LVD/EMC/RED合規證據、RCD/RDC保護，以及丹麥能源網併網/專案協調要求。須以230/400 V、50 Hz參數完成交付準備。丹麥風電滲透率高且已建立先進的智能充電生態（含V2G試點），意味著商業部署通常也需具備OCPP和智能充電功能。奧胡斯港和哥本哈根港為主要入境口岸。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, electrical-installation authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
